Document:
# Proto-Laspi
Despite their semi-solid nature, Laspi can comfortably support protogen-grade cybernetics. Although it might.. Sink in a little from time to time.
## Resistances - Receive [color=#8147ff]25% more shock damage[/color], [color=#65807d]10% more slash damage[/color], [color=#b9bf93]10% more pierce damage[/color], and [color=#1e90ff]30% more cold damage[/color]. - Receive [color=#FF3636]30% less blunt damage[/color] and [color=#64ffe6]20% less poison damage[/color].
